brief.demand: Replace three board directors including CEO Melissa Smith as board chair to improve governance and hold management accountable for underperformance
brief.rationale: WEX has significantly underperformed peers like Corpay with operating margins trailing by 18+ points and total shareholder returns lagging by 81% over three years
brief.watch_for: WEX's annual shareholder meeting on May 5, 2026 where the proxy contest will be decided

brief.demand: Board representation by electing three nominated directors to replace current directors to improve accountability and strategic oversight
brief.rationale: Years of sustained underperformance with stock price decline, operating margins 18+ points below peer Corpay, and poor capital allocation decisions
brief.watch_for: May 5, 2026 annual meeting vote results and whether Impactive's nominees are elected to the board

brief.demand: Seeking to elect independent director nominee Rory A. Held to the board at the April 30, 2026 annual meeting
brief.rationale: Claims dual-class structure and lack of board accountability have led to lagging returns, poor capital allocation, deficient disclosure and outsized executive compensation
brief.watch_for: April 30, 2026 annual shareholder meeting vote results

brief.demand: Nominate independent director Rory A. Held to the Board to provide Class A shareholder representation and improve governance oversight
brief.rationale: Ingles Markets has dual-class share structure with lack of boardroom accountability leading to lagging shareholder returns, operational underperformance, poor capital allocation, deficient disclosure and transparency issues
brief.watch_for: Annual shareholder meeting on April 30, 2026 where proxy vote will determine if Summer Road's nominee gains board seat

brief.target_company: BlackRock ESG Capital Allocation Term Trust
brief.demand: Saba is seeking to elect eight nominees to the board of trustees to gain majority control and improve governance.
brief.rationale: The fund trades at a significant discount to net asset value and has underperformed peers due to poor governance and board entrenchment.
brief.watch_for: The 2026 annual shareholder meeting where Saba's eight board nominees will be voted on, potentially giving them majority control of the board

brief.demand: Elect independent nominee Rory Held to the board to provide Class A shareholder representation
brief.rationale: Alleges poor governance, stagnant Class A dividend, inadequate transparency, and underperforming capital allocation by the dual-class controlled company
brief.watch_for: April 30, 2026 annual shareholder meeting vote results and potential customer boycott concerns over Sackler family connections

brief.demand: Seeking to elect independent nominee Rory A. Held to the Board to provide Class A shareholder representation
brief.rationale: Alleges poor governance, weak capital allocation, inadequate transparency, and failure to unlock real estate value in dual-class structure controlled by Ingle family
brief.watch_for: Outcome of April 30, 2026 annual meeting proxy vote

brief.activist: Wilson/House of Wilson entities (Dennis J. Wilson and affiliated investment entities)
brief.demand: Elect three independent director nominees and declassify the board to enable annual elections for all directors
brief.rationale: Targeting poor stock performance (65% decline over two years) and board governance failures including lack of CEO succession planning
brief.watch_for: 2026 annual shareholder meeting proxy vote results and board response to governance proposals
